Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures real purchase intent data from the existing customer base, validating which gaps are worth filling before DFC commits to sourcing new inventory.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Consolidates the scraped catalog data, DFC cross-reference results, and customer demand responses into one formatted output sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a single, decision-ready document that eliminates the need to reconcile multiple sources, so Dino can act on sourcing decisions immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active ad copy across Meta and TikTok campaigns, retrieving the full text content of every live advertisement.
Meta Investigation.impact: Eliminates the need to manually open and review each ad individually, capturing the entire active ad library in one automated sweep.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans every retrieved ad copy for specified target phrases and records the exact field and verbatim text where each match is found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Surfaces every instance of flagged language with pinpoint accuracy, ensuring no match is missed and removing the risk of manual review oversight.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a structured flagged list showing each matched phrase, the ad it appeared in, and the exact field where the copy was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, actionable findings report in the requester's inbox on demand, enabling rapid compliance review or copy audits without any manual digging.

summary: Our AI automation pipeline is moving right along — we currently have 53 agents total, with 24 completed, 9 in progress, and 20 planned. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages. While it was a quieter week on the tracking side, the breadth of what's already live and actively running across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, SEO, and sales automation continues to deliver real value for the team. With 20 planned agents still in the queue, there's plenty of exciting work on the horizon — stay tuned for more updates as things progress!
